name: Spicy Italian Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato sauce, 1 tablespoon Italian seasoning, and 1/8 teaspoon salt in a small saucepan.
2. Cover and cook over medium heat until hot; set aside and keep warm.
3. Combine the turkey, garlic, remaining 1 tablespoon Italian seasoning, fennel seeds, crushed red pepper, and 1/8 teaspoon salt. Stir until blended.
4. Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions and shape into 0.5-inch thick patties.
5. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot.
6. Add the patties and cook about 9 minutes, or until done, turning once.
7. Place the patties on a serving platter; top with sauce.
211 Cal. per Patty & 1/4 C. sauce
